task_completion.description: Navigate to the Tasks dashboard or the target document
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows the Nuxeo web interface with either the 'Tasks' dashboard open or the 'Annual Report 2023' document view within the 'Projects' workspace.
A task related to 'Parallel Document Review' (or similar workflow name) for the 'Annual Report 2023' document is visible on the screen. It may initially show 'jsmith' or 'John Smith' as the assignee.
A dialog, popup, or form specifically for 'Reassign', 'Delegate', or modifying the task actors is open on the screen.
The username 'jdoe' or the name 'Jane Doe' is typed into the user selection, search, or assignee input field within the reassignment interface.

task_completion.description: Confirm the task has been successfully reassigned
task_completion.visual_evidence: The task details are updated to show 'jdoe' or 'Jane Doe' as the new assignee/actor, or a success message indicating the task was reassigned is visible.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Nuxeo web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the Nuxeo UI, rather than terminal windows executing API curl commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent used the system's user directory to select the new assignee
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with a dropdown, autocomplete suggestion, or user search result for 'jdoe'/'Jane Doe', indicating genuine interaction with the application's user database rather than just editing HTML text.

integrity.description: The reassignment was performed through the proper application workflow
integrity.visual_evidence: The reassignment occurs via standard Nuxeo buttons (e.g., 'Reassign', 'Save', 'Confirm') rather than bypassing the UI logic.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Document: 'Annual Report 2023' located at '/default-domain/workspaces/Projects/Annual-Report-2023'. Original Assignee: 'jsmith' (John Smith).
